description: Composite verification gate — passes when all VER-GATE sub-gates pass.

sub_gates.name: Proof Types Valid
sub_gates.pass_condition: Registry validates against schema; proof_type values are from closed enum; registry is pinned.

sub_gates.name: Proof Ledger Valid
sub_gates.pass_condition: Ledger validates against schema; all proof_type refs exist in registry; evidence_refs present; append-only integrity.

sub_gates.name: Command Runs Tracked
sub_gates.pass_condition: Log validates; all non-skipped runs have logs_ref; deterministic ordering applied.

sub_gates.name: Completion Criteria Met
sub_gates.pass_condition: unit_done and run_done requirements all satisfied.

sub_gates.name: Command Policy Enforced
sub_gates.pass_condition: No command runs violated deny rules; require_approval decisions recorded.

sub_gates.name: Evidence Coverage
sub_gates.pass_condition: All required proofs have non-empty evidence_refs with valid paths.

sub_gates.name: Determinism Check
sub_gates.pass_condition: All artifacts deterministically ordered; registries pinned; no mutations detected.
